solvent.error: OpenMM box size shrunk below 2x nonbonded cutoff (1.0 nm padding too small for solvent leg)

binding_free_energy_partial.note: ΔG_bind cannot be computed without solvent leg. Solvent leg re-run with 1.5nm padding required.
binding_free_energy_partial.expected_complete: If solvent leg gives ΔG_solvent_decouple ~ 1-2 kcal/mol (typical for benzene), then ΔG_bind ≈ ΔG_solvent - 2.695 - (-0.158) = (1-2) - 2.695 + 0.158 = -1.5 to -0.5 kcal/mol
binding_free_energy_partial.interpretation: Initial complex-leg ΔG = 2.695 may be too low — flat-bottom 8Å restraint may be too loose for tight T4L99A cavity. Boresch 6-DOF restraint or smaller flat-bottom (5Å) may give better calibration. Documented as protocol limitation.
